notes: Monthly consensus estimate file. Y1/Y2/Y3 map to 2027/2028/2029 for baseYear 2026. Use analyst consensus net income when available; otherwise convert consensus EPS by diluted shares and document the source.

items.note: StockAnalysis public page shows 2027 EPS avg about $0.77 and 63.66M shares outstanding; converted Y1 profit is about $49M. 2028/2029 public consensus profit is not visible on the free page.

No current public multi-analyst consensus net income page was accessible. Fallback is Redeye single-analyst estimates: 2027e net income about -13M SEK and 2028e about 56M SEK, converted at roughly 0.107 USD/SEK from recent SEK/USD public quotes. Keep low confidence and leave 2029 null.
MarketScreener public estimates page shows 2027 net income about -$6.959M. Public 2028/2029 net income consensus was not visible without paid access, so those remain null.
MarketScreener public estimates page shows 2027 net income about $137.5M. No public 2028/2029 net income consensus was visible on the free page.
MarketScreener public estimates page shows 2027 net income about $381.4M. 2028/2029 public net income consensus was not visible without paid access.

BusinessQuant public annual EPS consensus shows 2027 about $43.08 and 2028 about $49.11; StockAnalysis shows 1.13B shares outstanding, implying about $48.7B and $55.5B profit. 2029 public EPS consensus was not visible on the free page.

MarketScreener public estimates page shows annual net income around $42.97M for 2027 and $63.55M for 2028. Market cap converted from about EUR 1.05B using a recent public EUR/USD quote near 1.16. 2029 remains null because a public figure was not visible.
StockAnalysis public page shows 2027 EPS avg about $4.56 and 46.04M shares outstanding; converted Y1 profit is about $210M. 2028/2029 public consensus profit is not visible on the free page.
